problem id: d8d3648f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10101001 -> 00011100
  01011010 -> 11111101
  11000111 -> 01011011
  01110100 -> 10011010
  10111110 -> 10101111
  11001101 -> 00001110
  00010110 -> 10111011
  01001111 -> 01011111

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 01100100
